contract.rationale: Cross-organisation messaging uses a published Communication companion so callback and delivery proofs stay deterministic.

identifierPolicy.label: Transport correlation key
identifierPolicy.description: Communication identifiers bind dispatch or callback correlation tokens to the governing case and attempt.
identifierPolicy.versionRule: Duplicate transport receipts update the same logical id; semantic drift opens replay collision review.

cardinalityPolicy.label: Single communication per dispatch or callback epoch
cardinalityPolicy.description: Each dispatch or callback epoch emits at most one current Communication companion at a time.

redactionPolicy.label: Minimal partner interchange
redactionPolicy.description: Only partner-required structured fields and declared profile elements may cross the boundary.

companionArtifactPolicy.label: Partner exchange manifest
companionArtifactPolicy.description: External bundles may carry an omission/redaction manifest that traces every excluded artifact or field to policy.

replayPolicy.label: Stable callback set by transport correlation
replayPolicy.description: Duplicate or reordered callbacks target the same representation set until semantic drift forces collision review.

supersessionPolicy.label: Communication supersession on settlement revision
supersessionPolicy.description: Communication companions supersede only when the same dispatch or callback epoch receives a stronger settlement or contradiction.

callbackCorrelationPolicy.label: Transport correlation keys
callbackCorrelationPolicy.description: Message or callback companions correlate via declared transport tokens and durable receipt checkpoints only.

exchangeBundlePolicies.authoritativeSuccess: Transport acceptance and delivery evidence must both settle on the same dispatch envelope and correlation key.
exchangeBundlePolicies.supersessionBehavior: Settlement upgrades supersede earlier pending companions without rewriting the dispatch envelope.
exchangeBundlePolicies.invalidationBehavior: Semantic drift or correlation reuse opens replay collision review and invalidates current confirmation.
